| ::DR34M_AI | Dream systems + AI integration into ritual + visuals |

---

### V. | MODULAR EXPORT STRUCTURE (MOBILE + BACKEND)

Each module will output into iOS Notes format:

- HEADER
- SYSTEM CONTEXT
- ARCHIVAL PATH
- REF_ID
- CONTENT (raw + markdown)
- NEXT ACTIONS

File tags and reference headers will match GitHub-friendly `.md` structure.

---

### VI. | COMPARATIVE SYSTEMS TO BE INTEGRATED

You requested expansion into real-world analogues to further ground and evolve the recursive logic. We will integrate:

- Jungian archetypes
- Campbell’s Monomyth
- Deleuze & Guattari (rhizome, desiring machines)
